backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that composes blob storage, authorization, and user-approval mixins, and exposes endpoints for managing user profiles, approval requests, and admin approval actions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles (splash screen, role-based login, user registration, etc.) to their implementing source files, component dependencies, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON file containing short summaries of two frontend source files: App.tsx (routing/layout) and BookingPage.tsx (multi-step booking flow).
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, chart colors, sidebar).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Sparkling app that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages client-side navigation via a currentPath state, renders a SplashScreen on initial load, conditionally shows a Header, and routes to the appropriate page component based on the current path.
frontend/src/components/BannerCarousel.t: Auto-advancing banner carousel component that cycles through three promotional banners with gradient backgrounds, navigation arrows, and dot indicators every 4 seconds.
frontend/src/components/ContractApplicat: Modal dialog component that lets a user submit a contract application by entering a bid amount, team size, and optional notes, then calls an onSubmit callback with the collected data.
frontend/src/components/EarningsPanel.ts: Displays an earnings dashboard with summary cards for total earned and pending balance, plus a transaction history list using hardcoded demo data.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation header with role-based nav links, cart icon, notification bell, and a user dropdown menu with logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: Bell icon button that shows an unread count badge and toggles a NotificationsPanel dropdown on click.
frontend/src/components/NotificationsPan: Dropdown panel listing notifications with type-specific icons and colors, supporting mark-all-read and displaying relative timestamps.
frontend/src/components/PaymentSummary.t: Renders a payment breakdown card showing service amount, platform commission fee, and total for a given service.
frontend/src/components/RatingModal.tsx: Dialog modal for submitting a 1–5 star rating and optional text review for an electrician after a job.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCategorie: Displays a grid of clickable electrical service category buttons (repair, installation, emergency, etc.) with colored icons.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Persistent left sidebar for dashboard layouts showing the brand logo, user info, role-based nav items with active highlighting, and a version footer.
frontend/src/components/SplashScreen.tsx: Animated splash screen component that cycles through enter, arc, and exit phases over ~2.5 seconds before calling an onComplete callback, displaying the Sparkling logo with electric arc effects.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: React context providing shopping cart state and operations (add, remove, update quantity, clear) with derived totals for item count and price.
frontend/src/contexts/NotificationContex: React context managing a list of typed notifications with demo seed data, exposing unread count, mark-all-read, and add-notification functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via React Query, using the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for user profile CRUD, approval management, and admin checks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Inter font and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for the dark-first Sparkling design system, utility classes, and splash screen keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/BookingPage.tsx: A multi-step booking page for scheduling an electrician, handling service/date/time selection, payment summary, booking confirmation, and a post-booking rating modal.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: A shopping cart page that displays marketplace items with quantity controls, item removal, and a payment summary, using the CartContext for state management.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerHome.tsx: The customer home page showing a personalized greeting, banner carousel, service categories, location-based search, and a list of top-rated featured electricians.
frontend/src/pages/ElectricianAdminDashb: An admin dashboard for managing electricians, including tabs for overview, electrician listings with status filtering, and approval/rejection of pending verifications via backend queries.
An electrician's personal dashboard with a sidebar and tabs for profile, jobs, earnings, documents, and reviews, plus an online/offline availability toggle.
A page for discovering and filtering verified electricians by name, location, category, and radius, displaying results as cards with ratings and a rating modal.
frontend/src/pages/ElectricianRegister.t: A multi-step registration form for electricians to submit personal info, service categories, and documents, saving the profile via a backend mutation on completion.
frontend/src/pages/GovernmentContracts.t: A page listing open government electrical contracts with bid details, and a tab for contractors to view their submitted applications and statuses.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: A login page supporting multiple demo roles with preset credentials, saving the user profile and navigating to the appropriate role-based dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/Marketplace.tsx: An electrical products marketplace page with category filtering, search, and add-to-cart functionality with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx: Registration page component that collects user profile info (name, phone, email, password, location, role) with validation, saves it via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` hook, and redirects to home on success.
frontend/src/pages/SuperAdminDashboard.t: Super admin dashboard page with sidebar navigation, metric cards, and tabbed views for overview, verification queue (approve/reject approvals), revenue, disputes, and notifications including broadcast messaging.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom brand colors (spark tokens), fonts, shadows, border radii, and animations, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the Sparkling marketplace platform's architecture, roles, existing features, known issues, and image requirements for build planning and continuity tracking.
